title: feat: allowlist sixfingerdev for community models
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Welcome to the modelers club
gist.blurb: We just handed sixfingerdev the keys to the community models garden. Can't wait to see what they plant!
gist.summary: Added GitHub user sixfingerdev to the community models allowlist, enabling them to publish custom models.
gist.impact: sixfingerdev can now deploy and share their own AI models directly through the pollinations.ai infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot welcoming a new creator to the garden, handing them a glowing seed representing model publishing rights.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden seed to a friendly pixel-art hacker character sitting at a retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'WELCOME'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
